name: Scope GitHub verify by changed app
description: Make the GitHub verify workflow run only the affected app checks and avoid installing or testing the unrelated workspace package.
evidence: .github/workflows/verify-code.yml now triggers only for app/shared config changes, installs all dependencies once, and runs the existing root scripts for just the affected web and/or worker checks; .github/workflows/harness-size-check.yml now path-filters to harness/script changes and skips unnecessary Node setup; validation completed locally by reviewing the workflow diff and parsing the workflow YAML structure.
